message:
fix(connector): length-prefix hash inputs in lease_conflict fork_log_entry

Replace |‐delimited variable-length string fields (lease_lo, lease_hi,
resource, trace_id, action_id) with length-prefixed encoding in the
fork_log_entry hash computation to prevent delimiter-collision attacks.

26 tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
